creator: nosuzuki@e-mail.ne.jp
text:
Please update ppxp ports to use Tcl83 and Tk83. This port is using Tcl82 and Tk82 now. This is not critical problem to fix for the 4.2-RELEASE.

This port have description for ja-ppxp but there is no change for this part. There are not Tcl83 and Tk83 supporting Japanse language.

Thnak you.
